framework.log.tracking_wheel_timeout_rem.source_template: Tracking wheel timeout (remainder), abandoning this wheel input: ({x}, {y}, {delta}), total_batches={total_batches}, finished={finished_batches}, timeout={effective_timeout:.2f}s
